title: Neobambus dolichanthus
taxonomy: Neobambus dolichanthus is classified as a species of bamboo in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Neobambus, which is a group of bamboo species native to Central and South America. The specific name 'dolichanthus' refers to the elongated shape of its flowers. Neobambus dolichanthus is a type of running bamboo, meaning it spreads through underground stems called rhizomes. This bamboo species is often used for ornamental purposes due to its unique growth habit and attractive foliage.
